Package com.acs.smartcardio

Class BluetoothTerminalManager

java.lang.Object
com.acs.smartcardio.BluetoothTerminalManager
public class BluetoothTerminalManager extends Object
The BluetoothTerminalManager class manages card terminals and uses as a parameter to initialize ACS Bluetooth provider.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    BluetoothTerminalManager.TerminalScanCallback
    Callback interface used to deliver terminal scan results.

  • Constructor Details

    • BluetoothTerminalManager

      public BluetoothTerminalManager(android.content.Context context)
      Creates an instance of BluetoothTerminalManager with context.
      Parameters:
      context - the context
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if Bluetooth is not supported on the device

  • Method Details

    • startScan

      public void startScan(int terminalType, BluetoothTerminalManager.TerminalScanCallback callback)
      Starts the scanning for available card terminals.
      Parameters:
      terminalType - the terminal type. It can be TERMINAL_TYPE_ACR3901U_S1, TERMINAL_TYPE_ACR1255U_J1, TERMINAL_TYPE_AMR220_C or TERMINAL_TYPE_ACR1555U.
      callback - the callback for delivering scan results

    • stopScan

      public void stopScan()
      Stops the scanning for available card terminals.

    • getTimeouts

      public TerminalTimeouts getTimeouts(CardTerminal terminal)
      Gets the timeouts from the card terminal.
      Parameters:
      terminal - the card terminal
      Returns:
      the timeouts.

    • setMasterKey

      public void setMasterKey(CardTerminal terminal, byte[] masterKey)
      Sets the master key from the card terminal.
      Parameters:
      terminal - the card terminal
      masterKey - the master key

    • getTerminalType

      public int getTerminalType(CardTerminal terminal)
      Gets the terminal type from the card terminal.
      Parameters:
      terminal - the card terminal
      Returns:
      the terminal type
      Since:
      0.3

    • getBatteryStatus

      public int getBatteryStatus(CardTerminal terminal, long timeout) throws CardException
      Gets the battery status from the card terminal.
      Parameters:
      terminal - the card terminal
      timeout - the maximum time to wait in milliseconds
      Returns:
      the battery status
      Throws:
      CardException - if the card operation failed
      Since:
      0.4

    • getBatteryLevel

      public int getBatteryLevel(CardTerminal terminal, long timeout) throws CardException
      Gets the battery level from the card terminal.
      Parameters:
      terminal - the card terminal
      timeout - the maximum time to wait in milliseconds
      Returns:
      the battery level. -1 if the card terminal does not support it.
      Throws:
      CardException - if the card operation failed
      Since:
      0.4

    • getDeviceInfo

      public String getDeviceInfo(CardTerminal terminal, int type, long timeout) throws CardException
      Gets the device information from the card terminal.
      Parameters:
      terminal - the card terminal
      type - the device information type
      timeout - the maximum time to wait in milliseconds
      Returns:
      the device information. null if the card terminal does not support it
      Throws:
      CardException - if the card operation failed
      Since:
      0.5

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect(CardTerminal terminal)
      Disconnects the card terminal.
      Parameters:
      terminal - the card terminal
